title: Zama, Morpho, and Steakhouse Launch First Confidential DeFi Yield Vault on Ethereum
summary: Zama, Morpho, and Steakhouse have launched the first confidential DeFi yield vault on Ethereum, allowing firms to earn yield without exposing their balances. This innovation enhances privacy for institutional and high-net-worth investors in the DeFi space.
body:
Zama, Morpho, and Steakhouse have introduced the first confidential DeFi yield vault on Ethereum. This new product enables firms to earn yield on their crypto assets without revealing their balances, a significant step forward for privacy in decentralized finance.

The vault leverages advanced cryptographic techniques to ensure that asset balances remain confidential while still allowing users to earn interest. This is particularly beneficial for institutional investors and high-net-worth individuals who prioritize privacy in their financial transactions.

For everyday users, this development means that DeFi platforms are becoming more secure and private. It opens up opportunities for larger players to participate in DeFi without the usual transparency concerns, potentially leading to more liquidity and better yields for all users.

The collaboration between Zama, Morpho, and Steakhouse brings together expertise in privacy, lending, and yield optimization. This vault is expected to set a new standard for confidential transactions in the DeFi ecosystem, making it a notable milestone in the evolution of blockchain technology.
twitterThread: Big news in DeFi: Zama, Morpho, and Steakhouse just launched the first confidential yield vault on Ethereum. No more exposing your balances to earn interest!
This vault uses advanced crypto to keep your asset balances private while still letting you earn yield. Perfect for institutions and privacy-conscious users.

If you're in DeFi and care about privacy, this is a game-changer. Watch for more confidential products to emerge. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-17-zama-morpho-and-steakhouse-launch-first-confidential-defi-yield-vault-on-ethereu
standaloneTweet: Earn DeFi yield without exposing your balances? Zama, Morpho, and Steakhouse just launched the first confidential yield vault on Ethereum. Privacy meets profit!
